4.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. Most modern compilers either warn about it or do not support it, leading to a compilation error. Use 'fgets' instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. Most modern compilers either warn about it or do not support it, leading to a compilation error. Use 'fgets' instead.]
